summary: Iteration 55 - Tested Unified Floating Island feature. All features working correctly: FAB appears on homepage (bottom right), expands with fan-out animation, shows role-appropriate tools (Guest: Hispalo AI only, Customer: Chat + Hispalo AI, Producer: Chat + Hispalo AI + Sales Assistant, Influencer: Chat + Hispalo AI + Creative AI), panels open/close correctly, and island is hidden on auth pages.

critical_code_review_comments: UnifiedFloatingIsland.js: Correctly implements role-based tool visibility using getUserRole() function
UnifiedFloatingIsland.js: HIDDEN_ON_PATHS array properly hides island on auth pages
UnifiedFloatingIsland.js: Fan-out animation implemented with animate-in classes and staggered delays
UnifiedFloatingIsland.js: Proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements (floating-island-main, floating-tool-{id})
UnifiedFloatingIsland.js: Click outside handler properly closes expanded menu
AIAssistant.js: Accepts forceOpen/onForceClose props for embedded mode
InternalChat.js: Accepts isEmbedded/onClose props for embedded mode
SellerAIAssistant.js: Accepts isEmbedded/onClose props for embedded mode
InfluencerAIAssistant.js: Accepts isEmbedded/onClose props for embedded mode
App.js: UnifiedFloatingIsland replaces individual AIAssistant component
seed_data_creation: Created test influencer user (influencer@test.com) with session token for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 55 verified all Unified Floating Island features. Key implementations: 1) UnifiedFloatingIsland.js orchestrates all assistants in a single expandable FAB, 2) Role-based tool visibility (guest=AI only, customer=Chat+AI, producer=Chat+AI+Sales, influencer=Chat+AI+Creative), 3) Fan-out animation with staggered delays, 4) Island hidden on auth pages via HIDDEN_ON_PATHS array, 5) Each assistant component accepts isEmbedded/onClose props for embedded mode.
features_tested: Unified floating island FAB on homepage
Role-based tool visibility (guest, customer, producer, influencer)
Chat panel opening for logged-in users
Island hidden on auth pages (login, register, forgot-password)
